subject: [PATCH v5 08/36] mm/mempolicy: skip private node folios when queueing for migration

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch modifies the Linux kernel's memory policy module to skip private node folios when queueing them for migration. Private nodes are not included in policy nodemasks, but could still be encountered during an mbind(MPOL_MF_MOVE) walk. The patch adds a filter to prevent mempolicy-driven migration from moving private-node memory, similar to the existing filter for ZONE_DEVICE folios.
